label: SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization

node.label: SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization
node.definition: Stochastic gradient descent estimates gradients from minibatches; momentum and related variants accumulate update direction to reduce noise and accelerate consistent descent.
node.why_it_matters: The role of SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization is to connect Optimization theory, Calculus & automatic differentiation theory to downstream capabilities including Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers.
examples: substrate for Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Optimization theory, Calculus & automatic differentiation theory.

dependencies.rationale: SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization uses Calculus & automatic differentiation theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
